title: Parking regulations pertaining to particular streets (Sec. TPR-176)

street.description: Street the regulation applies to (the heading the clause falls under)

clause.description: The numbered clause this row came from, e.g. '1'

restriction.description: Leading restriction phrase, normalized lowercase (e.g. 'prohibited', 'two-hour limit', 'one-hour limit', '15-minute limit', 'parking meter zone', 'resident permit only', 'loading zone', 'no stopping')

side.description: Side(s) of street; usually a common#side value but 176 also has compound/variant forms ('north and south', 'see notes'); empty when the clause states none

from_point.description: Start of the segment when the clause gives 'X to Y'; empty for whole-street or when not a clean range

to_point.description: End of the segment; 'end' for the street's end; empty otherwise

extent.description: 'entire length' when the clause covers the whole street; else empty

schedule.description: Day/time text verbatim-ish (e.g. '7:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m.; except Saturdays, Sundays and Holidays'); for a clause with lettered a)/b)/c) sub-windows, all of them joined with '; '

source_text.description: The full numbered clause verbatim (wrapped lines rejoined, whitespace/quotes normalized), prefixed with the street name to be unique

notes.description: Cross-references (e.g. 'see TPR-202'), lettered-sub-clause presence, or anomalies
